{
  "claims": [
    "The reinstatement of $15.4 million for CTE Programs is crucial to student success.",
    "Programs like FFA help to bring hands-on learning to the classroom and prepare students for future careers.",
    "The California Partnership Academy Program has proven to be successful in providing school districts with flexibility to focus on career technical programs based on their local labor market needs.",
    "A removal of funds supporting CTE programs will severely impact programs that have proven successful in preparing our future workforce.",
    "California has a shortage of a career-ready workforce."
